creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed


Actually I found the tarball (containing "Wnn6-demo" too, which 
I didn't commit) on ports.jp.freebsd.org so I committed it.  Please 
take a look at the changes, especially the "file:" URL in the Wnn6-lib 
port (you don't need any special casing for that :). 

Thanks!
